title: LACTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST LACTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers prenatal support and the opportunity to meet a pediatrician before making decisions about care. Chestfeeding and lactation support for parents experiencing challenges with expressing milk, weaning, painful feeding, feeding multiples, or concerns about baby’s weight. Additional support for bottle feeding, supplementation, pumping, and transitions back to school or work. 2701 NW Vaughn Street Suite 360 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Support is available to both enrolled patients and non-patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 227-0671 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 227-0671 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday/Sunday/Holiday 8am-noon by appointment Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST
